zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth de Valois於大約1038年出生在法國時，她的父親Raoul IV de Vexin20歲，母親Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil39歲。她和Sir Barthélemy de Broyes至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於從1093年到1101年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth de Valois于大约1038年出生在法国时，她的父亲Raoul IV de Vexin20岁，母亲Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil39岁。她和Sir Barthélemy de Broyes至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于从1093年到1101年。

nameMeanings.name: Valois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth de Valois was born about 1038, in France, her father, Raoul IV de Vexin, was 20 and her mother, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, was 39. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Sir Barthélemy de Broyes. She died from 1093 to 1101.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth de Valois est née environ 1038, à France, son père, Raoul IV de Vexin, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, avait 39 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Barthélemy de Broyes. Elle est décédée du 1093 au 1101.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth de Valois um 1038 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul IV de Vexin 20 und ihre Mutter Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil 39. Sie hatte mit Sir Barthélemy de Broyes mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb von 1093 bis 1101.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth de Valois è nata il circa 1038 nel Francia, sua padre, Raoul IV de Vexin, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, aveva 39 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Sir Barthélemy de Broyes. Morì da 1093 a 1101.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth de Valoisが約1038年にフランスで生まれた時，父Raoul IV de Vexinは20歳，母Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuilは39歳であった。彼女はSir Barthélemy de Broyesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女はから1093年まで1101年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth de Valois(이)가 대략 1038년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul IV de Vexin(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 Sir Barthélemy de Broyes(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1093년 부터 1101년 까지 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth de Valois nasceu aproximadamente 1038, em França, seu pai, Raoul IV de Vexin, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, tinha 39 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Sir Barthélemy de Broyes. Ela faleceu de 1093 a 1101.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth de Valois родилась около 1038 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul IV de Vexin было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, 39. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Sir Barthélemy de Broyes. Она умерла с 1093 по 1101.

sm.environ 1038–from 1093 to 1101: e tusa o le 1038–mai le 1093 e o'o I le 1101
sm.from 1093 to 1101: mai le 1093 e o'o I le 1101

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth de Valois nació aproximadamente 1038, en Francia, su papá, Raoul IV de Vexin, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Adèle de Bar-Sur-Aube de Breteuil, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Sir Barthélemy de Broyes. Murió desde 1093 hasta 1101.
